title: verbascum flabellifolium
intro: Verbascum flabellifolium, also known as the flax-leaved mullein, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Verbascum flabellifolium are said to provide relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. It is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its health benefits, and can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements and preparations.
